headline: Assessing Veralto (VLTO) Valuation After Mixed Earnings Beat And Softer Guidance
summary: Why Veralto’s latest earnings matter for shareholders Veralto (VLTO) has been in focus after reporting first quarter results that included revenue of US$1.40b, representing 3.8% year-on-year growth, alongside an earnings per share beat but softer guidance for the next quarter. See our latest analysis for Veralto. After a softer 90 day share price return of 10.53% and a year to date share price return decline of 6.27%, Veralto now trades at US$92.32, while the 1 year total shareholder return...
